title: Login with valid credentials
steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Enter username standard_user 3. Enter password secret_sauce 4. Click Login button

title: Login with invalid password
steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Enter username standard_user 3. Enter password wrong_pass 4. Click Login button
expectedResult: Error message should be displayed for invalid credentials

title: Login with empty username
steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Leave username field empty 3. Enter password secret_sauce 4. Click Login button
expectedResult: Error message Username is required should be displayed

title: Add item to cart
steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click on Sauce Labs Backpack 3. Click Add to cart button

title: Remove item from cart
steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Add an item to cart 3. Click cart icon 4. Click Remove button

title: Complete checkout flow
steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Add item to cart 3. Click cart icon 4. Click Checkout button 5. Fill first name John 6. Fill last name Doe 7. Fill zip code 12345 8. Click Continue 9. Click Finish
expectedResult: Order confirmation Thank you for your order should be displayed

title: Sort products by price low to high
steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click sort dropdown 3. Select Price low to high
expectedResult: Products should be sorted by ascending price

title: Verify product details page
steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click on Sauce Labs Backpack
expectedResult: Product name and description and price and Add to Cart button should be visible
